start:
Hello, I'm Cleanify! How can I help you?
If this is your first time using me, please check out the help section <3

language.clearingOldMenu: Cleanify has been rebuilt from the ground up! Clearing the old menu...

help.caption: This video shows you how to use the bot!

errors.channelError: The message you sent isn't forwarded from a channel. Please follow the help video :)
errors.differentChannelError: Those two messages are from different channels :/
errors.adminError: First, make me an admin of the channel with permission to delete messages. Then try again!
errors.deniedError: You're not an admin of that channel :/
errors.invalid: Sorry, I didn't understand that. Please choose from the menu!
errors.outOfOrder: The second message needs to be the same as or after the first one.

deleteFlow.firstMessagePrompt: Please forward the message you want me to start cleaning from:
deleteFlow.secondMessagePrompt: Now forward the message you want me to stop cleaning at:
deleteFlow.confirmPrompt: This will delete approximately {count} messages from {channel}. Are you sure?
deleteFlow.done: Done! I deleted {count} messages. Thanks for using Cleanify!

channels.title: Your channels:
channels.empty: You haven't linked any channels yet. Forward a message from a channel to get started.

broadcast.unauthorized: You're not authorized to use this command.
broadcast.prompt: Send the message you want to broadcast to all users.

scheduledCleanup.chooseChannel: Which channel should auto-cleanup apply to?
scheduledCleanup.daysPrompt: After how many days should messages be automatically deleted? Send a whole number (e.g. 30).
scheduledCleanup.invalidDays: Please send a whole number of days, greater than 0 (e.g. 30).
scheduledCleanup.enabled: Auto-cleanup enabled: messages older than {days} days will be deleted automatically.
scheduledCleanup.disabled: Auto-cleanup disabled for all your channels.
scheduledCleanup.limitationNotice: Note: auto-cleanup can only apply to messages posted after I was added as an admin — I have no way to see the age of messages posted before that.
